shopping_440.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The agent failed to identify and add the *cheapest* ingredient to the cart. After navigating to the correct category ("Coffee, Tea & Cocoa"), the agent clicked "Add to Cart" on the first available item without comparing prices or sorting the products by price.
shopping_440.REFLECTION: When the objective requires finding the "cheapest" item, always sort the product listings by price (low to high) if available, or carefully scan all visible product prices to identify the lowest one before adding it to the cart. Ensure all required product options (like flavor or size) are selected before attempting to add to cart.
shopping_440.raw_response:
POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
The agent failed to identify and add the *cheapest* ingredient to the cart. After navigating to the correct category ("Coffee, Tea & Cocoa"), the agent clicked "Add to Cart" on the first available item without comparing prices or sorting the products by price.

REFLECTION:
When the objective requires finding the "cheapest" item, always sort the product listings by price (low to high) if available, or carefully scan all visible product prices to identify the lowest one before adding it to the cart. Ensure all required product options (like flavor or size) are selected before attempting to add to cart.
